summary: Iteration 3 (checkout v3: delivery_mode + promo_code + PIN-gated orders rubric) tested end-to-end on public Expo web preview (390x844). Backend: 17/17 pytest cases pass in /app/backend/tests/test_checkout_v3.py — delivery+empty address rejected 400 'Adresse de livraison requise', delivery+whitespace address rejected 400, pickup+no address persisted with address='', pickup with provided address has address dropped server-side, delivery happy path, WELCOME10 applies 10% discount with correct total, PROMO5 applies fixed -5€ (capped to subtotal), lowercase promo normalized to upper, invalid promo silently ignored (no error), promo/validate returns valid+kind+discount for WELCOME10/promo5, valid=false 'Code inconnu.' for missing, valid=false 'Code vide.' for empty, admin login PIN 2937 returns access_token, wrong PIN returns 401, admin/orders authenticated lists pickup orders with empty address. Frontend: home loads, bell icon (home-bell-btn) redirects to /admin/login when unauth and to /admin/orders when authed; Commandes bottom-nav tab redirects to /admin/login when unauth; checkout default mode=Livraison shows address field + button 'Commander · X,XX €'; switching to 'Sur place' hides address, shows info banner ('Vous serez contacté…'), button reads 'Réserver · X,XX €'; applying WELCOME10 on a 9,00 € subtotal shows row '− 0,90 €' and total 8,10 €; PROMO5 on the same subtotal shows '− 5,00 €' total 4,00 €; submitting in delivery mode shows success pill 'Livraison à domicile'; submitting in pickup mode shows pill 'Retrait sur place'; order detail (/order/[id]) shows section title 'Retrait sur place' with 'Click & Collect' pill, hides address, lists items + 'Réduction (PROMO5) − 5,00 €'; admin orders modal shows 'Sur place' pill in Client section and hides address for pickup orders. TWO SEED-DATA BUGS DETECTED AND FIXED IN DB TO UNBLOCK TESTING (see action_items): (1) Admin PIN 2937 hash in DB did not validate (had to rehash via bcrypt), (2) PROMO5 inserted with kind='fixed' but backend evaluate_promo only supports 'percent'|'amount'|'amount_min' — patched to kind='amount'. Telegram is configured and sends 200 OK notifications.

minor.issue: Backend supports kind in {'percent','amount','amount_min'} but the PROMO5 seed inserted kind='fixed' (silently rejected with 'Type de code inconnu.'). Either the seeding script must use 'amount', or evaluate_promo should accept 'fixed' as an alias. Reference: /app/backend/server.py:75-105.

ui_bugs.issue: On wrong PIN the error label renders the raw JSON body '{"detail":"PIN invalide"}' instead of just 'PIN invalide'. Likely missing .detail extraction or fallback string used as-is.

Console warning at boot: '[Layout children]: No route named "admin" exists in nested children: [checkout, index, settings, (tabs), admin/categories, admin/change-pin, admin/index, admin/login, admin/orders, admin/products, …]'. Functionally works but indicates a stale <Stack.Screen name="admin"/> in a layout file.

integration_issues.flow: Mes commandes tab → /admin/login → PIN entry → expected destination
integration_issues.issue: After successful PIN entry on /admin/login the app navigates to /admin (admin dashboard) instead of /admin/orders. Spec says 'redirect to /admin/orders if authenticated'. Already-authenticated users do reach /admin/orders directly (via bell or tab) — verified. But the freshly-logged-in user lands on /admin and must tap the 'Commandes' tile. Consider routing to /admin/orders on login when the user arrived via Mes commandes / bell.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning persists: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Source: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts shadow tokens used across cards. Carried over from iterations 1+2 — still not migrated.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Carried over from iterations 1+2.
expo doctor warns expo@54.0.34 (~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (~6.0.24). Same as iteration_2.

action_items: [CRITICAL DATA] Reseed the admin PIN to 2937: the hash currently stored in db.admin_config did not validate '2937' on first request (failed_attempts had reached 3 from prior runs). Testing agent rehashed via bcrypt to unblock UI testing — please make the reset script idempotent and verify via `POST /api/admin/login {pin:'2937'}` after each restart.

[CRITICAL DATA] Reseed PROMO5 with kind='amount' (or update evaluate_promo to alias 'fixed' → 'amount'). Testing agent patched the DB row to kind='amount' for testing. Reference: /app/backend/server.py:75-105.
[UX] /app/frontend/app/admin/login.tsx — extract `data.detail` from the JSON error body (or use a friendly fallback 'PIN invalide') instead of displaying the raw JSON string.

[ROUTING] After successful PIN entry, route to /admin/orders when the user came in from the orders rubric (intent param) so the spec line 'redirect to /admin/orders if authenticated' holds for freshly-logged-in users too.
[Cleanup] Remove the stale 'admin' route name in (tabs)/_layout.tsx that triggers the 'No route named admin exists' warning.
[Optional] Migrate /app/frontend/src/theme.ts shadow tokens to boxShadow for RN Web; align Expo SDK patch versions via `npx expo install expo expo-font expo-router`.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py:386-390 — delivery_mode normalisation is good (strip/lower; defaults to 'delivery' on unknown value), and address-required check is enforced only when mode == 'delivery'. Address is wiped server-side when mode == 'pickup' (line 440) — verified in test test_pickup_address_provided_is_dropped.

/app/backend/server.py:75-105 evaluate_promo — silently returns 'Type de code inconnu.' for any kind ∉ {percent, amount, amount_min}. The model docstring on line 65 also lists only these three. Either drop 'fixed' from any documentation/seeding script or add it as an alias.
/app/backend/server.py:425-433 — invalid promo on /api/orders is silently ignored (no 4xx). This matches spec note 'invalid promo silently ignored' but consider logging it for support.

/app/frontend/app/checkout.tsx:65-80 — order creation derives total/discount client-side then echoes server response onto `success` state. The mode pill uses `success.delivery_mode || mode` which is robust.
/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/orders.tsx — pure redirect screen; correctly does not render any order content. Verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all P0 + P1 flows verified

seed_data_creation: Created ~10 test orders during this iteration (delivery + pickup, with and without promo codes WELCOME10/PROMO5) under guest_id prefixes TEST_v3_*. WELCOME10 times_used was already at 1 before the run and incremented during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin PIN is 2937 (re-validated). PROMO5 in DB now has kind='amount'. Test orders created during this iteration: at least 1 pickup order (#EB32B12F) and 1 delivery order (#B302DE6B). The /admin route is reached at https://order-basket-5.preview.emergentagent.com/admin (admin dashboard with Commandes/Produits/Catégories/Notifications Telegram/Changer le PIN/Déconnexion tiles); /admin/orders is the orders list. The 'Sur place' pill in admin modal uses the literal string 'Sur place' (not 'Retrait sur place') — both refer to delivery_mode='pickup'. Loyalty hero on home still shows 0,00 € but main agent confirmed this is intentional leftover.
rca_of_issue:
Two pre-test environment issues:
(1) PIN 2937: failed_attempts had reached 3 (likely from prior wrong-PIN tests) and the stored bcrypt hash no longer matched '2937'. Reproduction: `curl -X POST .../api/admin/login -d '{"pin":"2937"}'` → 401 PIN invalide. Mitigation: rehashed via bcrypt and zeroed failed_attempts. Permanent fix: the migrate_variants startup routine should re-hash from ADMIN_INITIAL_PIN whenever admin_config exists but a flag (e.g. `pin_reset_required: true`) is set, OR the reset script (mentioned by main agent) needs to target the correct MONGO_URL/DB_NAME.
(2) PROMO5 kind mismatch: db.promo_codes.findOne({code:'PROMO5'}) returned kind='fixed' but server only handles {percent,amount,amount_min}. Reproduction: `curl -X POST .../api/promo/validate -d '{"code":"PROMO5","subtotal":50}'` → {valid:false, error:'Type de code inconnu.'}. Mitigation: `db.promo_codes.updateOne({code:'PROMO5'},{$set:{kind:'amount'}})`. Permanent fix: align the seeding script with the model contract.
